name: Sprout Coin Mascot
description: Canonical color tokens for the Sprout coin mascot. These mirror apps/mobile/lib/src/theme/sprout_tokens.dart and packages/design_tokens. Do not introduce off-palette colors in any mascot asset.

usage.coinGold: Primary coin body fill (use as gradient mid-stop).
usage.coinGoldLight: Top-left body gradient stop and hand/foot highlight.
usage.coinGoldDeep: Bottom-right body gradient stop for depth.
usage.coinShadowGold: Inner rim shadow on the coin body.
usage.leafDarkGreen: Leaf gradient end (bottom) and vein stroke.
usage.cheekBlush: Optional soft cheek tint on happy/celebrate states.
usage.mouthInner: Open mouth fill on celebrate state.
usage.mouthWarm: Inner mouth warm tint on celebrate state.

contrast.notes: Eye/mouth strokes use eyeDark on coinGold for AA contrast. Never use pure black; eyeDark is the brand-approved ink.
